narrative:
Winchester Township (precinct in Adams County) has 847 registered voters, with 49.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 37.3 percentage points.
